label: FACIS DSP — Catalogue
info:
FR-DSP-001 — POST /dsp/catalogue/request.

The catalogue is a static list of FACIS Gold-layer dataset offers. It is
mounted into the ORCE pod as a read-only ConfigMap at
/data/dsp-config/datasets.json and loaded into flow.context once at startup.

Filter + cursor logic mirrors src/dsp-connector/catalogue_store.py:7-139:
  - filter.assetType        -> exact match on metadata.assetType
  - filter.datasetIds        -> set membership on dataset.id
  - page.limit (default 50)  -> slice size
  - page.cursor              -> integer offset; non-numeric -> 0
  - nextCursor               -> str(start+limit) when more remain, else null

name: load FACIS_DATASETS
init empty catalogue
query_catalogue
